# Aura

> Aura is the strategic intelligence OS for senior professionals. It captures what you read, detects the patterns in your expertise, and helps you publish content that compounds authority.

Aura is built for Directors, VPs, CIOs, and CDOs — especially in the GCC — who read extensively but don't publish enough. The platform turns daily reading into strategic signals, then generates LinkedIn-ready content grounded in those signals and the user's own voice. English and Arabic are both supported.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, how Aura works, and how to request access.
- [Guide](/guide): How Aura works end-to-end — capture, signal detection, content generation, and the digital presence score.
- [Request access](/request-access): Apply to the closed beta.
- [Accept invitation](/accept-invitation): Landing page for invited users opening their welcome email.
- [Sign in](/auth): Sign in to an existing Aura account.

## Legal

- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service, acceptable use, and AI-generated content disclaimers.
- [Privacy](/privacy): What data Aura collects, how it's stored, and how AI providers process it.
